mapper.delete: delete synlte.object_store_fieldinfo a where a.tableinfoid not in (select tableinfoid from synlte.object_store_info)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO synlte.OBJECT_STORE_FIELDINFO (ID, TABLEINFOID, FIELDID, COLUMNNAME, FIELDCHINEENAME, FIELDTYPE, FIELDLEN, DEFAULTVALUE, TABLEINDEX, INDEXTYPE, NEEDVALUE, RECNO, PARTITION_RECNO, CLUST_RECNO, COLUMNFIELDTYPE, COLUMNFIELDLEN) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.tableInfoId}, #{item.fieldId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.columnName}, #{item.fieldChineeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.fieldType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.fieldLen,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.defaultValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tableIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.indexType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.needValue,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.recno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.partitionRecno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.clustRecno,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.columnFieldType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.columnFieldLen,jdbcType=INTEGER})
